title: I built a trading bot that beat the market — and why I'm grateful it failed.
summary: Quantbot was a copy-trading platform I built from scratch — ML signals, live execution, the works. The real lesson wasn't in the gains. It was in understanding what data can and can't tell you about human risk.

title: I quit Tech Mahindra without a backup plan. Here's what happened next.
summary: Impulsive resignation. No offer in hand. And a lesson about trusting your own decisions that I still carry.

title: Guitar, bass, drums — and why I still make time for none of them.
summary: Bengali family. Forced music classes. Discovered guitar in college. Now I play drums as a stress buster. Not productive. Just human.

title: 80% answer today beats 100% answer next week.
summary: The tension between being accurate and being fast in data science. Perfectionism in analysis has a real cost — and it's usually paid by the business.
